entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops used as a source of protein

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: Nutritional component of pulses

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current food needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant origin of actual or potential value

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Data and tools derived from the genome of an organism

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS RESOURCES
entities.description: Computational tools and databases for biological data analysis

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Living genetic resources such as seeds or tissues

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve crop varieties

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL CONTENT
entities.description: The presence and amount of nutrients in a crop

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms like pests or diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by non-living factors like drought or salinity

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of an organism's genome

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOMES
entities.description: A high-quality representative genome sequence of a species

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMES
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Technologies used to analyze and manipulate the genome

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic units of heredity

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of a plant that are important for agriculture

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist disease

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand adverse conditions

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: Targeted breeding using genomic tools for specific traits

entities.name: DATABASES
entities.description: Organized collections of genetic and phenotypic information

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of putting together short DNA sequences into a complete genome

entities.name: ANNOTATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the locations of genes and other features in a genome

entities.name: VARIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of genetic differences between individuals or populations

entities.name: PHENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to measure and analyze the physical and biochemical traits of organisms

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genome-wide markers to predict breeding values

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: Techniques to accelerate the plant breeding cycle

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Simulation of human intelligence by machines

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: A subset of AI that allows systems to learn from data

entities.name: GENOMIC SCIENCE
entities.description: The study of the structure, function, evolution, and mapping of genomes

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The health-promoting properties of the crop

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSES
entities.description: External pressures from the environment affecting plant growth
